mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INQUIRY_FILES( INQUIRY_FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_NAME, STORAGE_PATH, ATTACH_TARGET, INQUIRY_ID ) VALUES( SEQ_INQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{storagePath}, #{attachTarget}, #{inquiryId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT INQUIRY_ID AS inquiryId , TITLE , CONTENT , ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent , ANSWERED_AT AS answeredAt , CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INQUIRIES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND ANSWERED_AT IS NULL
AND ANSWERED_AT IS NOT NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY INQUIRY_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND ANSWERED_AT IS NULL
AND ANSWERED_AT IS NOT NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT TITLE AS title, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, CONTENT AS content, ANSWERED_AT AS answeredAt, ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent FROM INQUIRIES WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}

SELECT I.INQUIRY_ID AS inquiryId, I.TITLE, I.CONTENT, I.ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent, I.ANSWERED_AT AS answeredAt, I.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN STORES S ON I.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE I.DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND I.ANSWERED_AT IS NULL
AND I.ANSWERED_AT IS NOT NULL
AND I.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND I.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(I.INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY I.INQUIRY_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND ANSWERED_AT IS NULL
AND ANSWERED_AT IS NOT NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRIES SET ANSWER_CONTENT = #{answerContent}, ANSWERED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}
UPDATE INQUIRIES SET ANSWER_CONTENT = NULL, ANSWERED_AT = NULL WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}
mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT INQUIRY_ID , 'I' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM I.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(INQUIRY_ID, 4, '0') AS INQUIRY_CODE , TITLE , CASE WHEN ANSWERED_AT IS NULL THEN 'REQUESTED' WHEN ANSWERED_AT IS NOT NULL THEN 'ANSWERED' END AS STATUS , I.CREATED_AT , STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID ) WHERE I.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY I.CREATED_AT DESC , INQUIRY_ID DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{count}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE ANSWERED_AT IS NULL AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
